CustomField.description: Alliance / joint-venture partner carriers covered by this fare line (Delta's strategic partners; reuses the DL_Carriers value set shared with the header-level Participating Carriers). Edited per row in the modeling grid, independently of other lines. Non-price-impacting in the Term Builder demo.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Alliance partner carriers covered by this fare on this Term. Set per row in the modeling grid.
CustomField.label: Alliance Partners
